TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wufeng Nsgan Wufeng o gaga Nsgan Hsinchu, kmpraan kana dxgal o 210.04 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 139.96 km², dxgal pmblxan o 139.96 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,114, sapah o 1,895, seejiq tnpusu 4,517 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 88% (Embgala, Saysiyat). Embgala, Saysiyat ka hbaraw balay alang hini. endaan dgiyaq pnrhulan nyusan qpahan Nsgan Wufeng o niqan 4 alang ni maxal 31. 31 o, Maybalay , Kyu'ang , Oro'raw: , Mayl'ux , Mayhuman , R'ra' , Sipazi' , Tatoba' , Sansama:an , Sayie , Ip'ipa'an bato , Yohae' , Sansaru , Ulay , Takunan , Trayan , Lwax khu' , Minse , R'uyan , Ruba' , Kawabata , Kahaehaeoan , Ngangihaw , Singaw , Blangaw , Heku' , Kukung , Mintuyu , Skaru , T'apan , Si'ung . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: wu*əŋ nsgan wu*əŋ o gaga nsgan ħsinʦħu, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (əmbgala, sajsijat). əmbgala, sajsijat ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. əndaan dgijaq pnɾħulan njusan qpaħan nsgan wu*əŋ o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, majbalaj , kju'aŋ , oɾo'ɾaw: , majl'ux , majħuman , ɾ'ɾa' , sipa*i' , tatoba' , sansama:an , sajiə , ip'ipa'an bato , joħaə' , sansaɾu , ulaj , takunan , tɾajan , lwax kħu' , minsə , ɾ'ujan , ɾuba' , kawabata , kaħaəħaəoan , ŋaŋiħaw , siŋaw , blaŋaw , ħəku' , kukuŋ , mintuju , skaɾu , t'apan , si'uŋ . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Wufeng Nsgan Wufeng o gaga Nsgan Hsinchu, kmpraan kana dxgal o 210.04 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 139.96 km², dxgal pmblxan o 139.96 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,114, sapah o 1,895, seejiq tnpusu 4,517 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 88% (Embgala, Saysiyat). Embgala, Saysiyat ka hbaraw balay alang hini. endaan dgiyaq pnrhulan nyusan qpahan Nsgan Wufeng o niqan 4 alang ni maxal 31. 31 o, Maybalay , Kyu'ang , Oro'raw: , Mayl'ux , Mayhuman , R'ra' , Sipazi' , Tatoba' , Sansama:an , Sayie , Ip'ipa'an bato , Yohae' , Sansaru , Ulay , Takunan , Trayan , Lwax khu' , Minse , R'uyan , Ruba' , Kawabata , Kahaehaeoan , Ngangihaw , Singaw , Blangaw , Heku' , Kukung , Mintuyu , Skaru , T'apan , Si'ung . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: wu*əŋ nsgan wu*əŋ o gaga nsgan ħsinʦħu, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (əmbgala, sajsijat). əmbgala, sajsijat ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. əndaan dgijaq pnɾħulan njusan qpaħan nsgan wu*əŋ o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, majbalaj , kju'aŋ , oɾo'ɾaw: , majl'ux , majħuman , ɾ'ɾa' , sipa*i' , tatoba' , sansama:an , sajiə , ip'ipa'an bato , joħaə' , sansaɾu , ulaj , takunan , tɾajan , lwax kħu' , minsə , ɾ'ujan , ɾuba' , kawabata , kaħaəħaəoan , ŋaŋiħaw , siŋaw , blaŋaw , ħəku' , kukuŋ , mintuju , skaɾu , t'apan , si'uŋ . pusupnjaħan patas
